change_summary: Combine a narrow post-recenter divergence-memory release with a slightly more directional 650/850 above-threshold burst split on top of the lighter shared-flow tax line.
description: Seed fresh retained screen run from the best raw refinement found under apr08-screen460-1813.
label: refined-seed-from-1813-screen-0003

change_summary: Add a deadbanded inventory reservation skew: divergence-plus-spot-jump widens the inventory-worsening side and slightly deepens the rebalancing-side cut without changing the base stress thresholds.
decision_summary: delta -0.005084 did not clear promotion margin 19.285113
description: Add a reservation-style deadbanded inventory skew from divergence memory and recent price change on top of the current directional burst line.
label: deadbanded-inventory-skew-v1

change_summary: From the first inventory-skew refine, keep the toxic-side surcharge and replace the broad rebalancing-side relief with a smaller opportunity-gated discount.
decision_summary: delta -0.005346 did not clear promotion margin 19.285114
description: Keep the deadbanded toxic-side inventory skew, but shrink and gate the rebalancing-side relief by the existing opportunity gate.
label: gated-inventory-skew-v2

change_summary: Reduce the deadbanded inventory-skew gain and apply it only as a toxic-side surcharge, leaving the rebalancing side to the base strategy opportunity cuts.
decision_summary: delta -0.005596 did not clear promotion margin 19.285129
description: Keep only a smaller toxic-side inventory surcharge and remove the extra rebalancing-side relief.
label: toxic-only-inventory-skew-v3

change_summary: Lower the common divergence term from 650 to 450 bps and reallocate part of that pricing into a deadbanded toxic-side divergence skew driven by divergence memory plus recent spot jump.
decision_summary: delta -0.035658 did not clear promotion margin 19.289775
description: Reduce common divergence carry and reallocate part of it into a deadbanded toxic-side skew.
label: divergence-to-toxic-reallocation-v1

change_summary: Keep the incumbent line but raise the burst surcharge threshold from 8 to 10 bps, preserving the 650/850 shared-versus-directional split above threshold.
decision_summary: delta -0.146836 did not clear promotion margin 19.301444
description: Raise the above-threshold burst trigger from 8 to 10 bps so moderate events stay closer to the normal regime.
label: higher-burst-threshold-v1

change_summary: From the incumbent, subtract a 4 bps deadband from the shared one-sided flow carry before applying the common spread tax, leaving the directional burst and side-specific risk logic unchanged.
decision_summary: delta -0.020103 did not clear promotion margin 19.299343
description: Add a deadband to the shared one-sided flow carry so mild imbalance stays in the normal common-fee regime.
label: shared-flow-deadband-v1

change_summary: From the incumbent, add a discrete 6 bps shared rebate only when gap, hazard, flow pressure, and vol all indicate a genuinely ultraquiet state.
decision_summary: delta -0.015744 did not clear promotion margin 19.290267
description: Add a strict fixed rebate only in clearly calm regimes after longer quiet gaps.
label: ultraquiet-fixed-rebate-v1

change_summary: From the incumbent, keep all current burst logic but scale common divergence pricing down to 70% only when eventSignal exceeds the 8 bps burst threshold.
decision_summary: delta -0.027918 did not clear promotion margin 19.289564
description: Reduce common divergence carry only while the burst regime is active.
label: burst-regime-divergence-saturation-v1
